entry.value: SELECT id, CASE WHEN last_scraped IS NULL THEN -1 ELSE last_scraped END AS last_scraped_id, name, description, neighborhood_overview, host_id, host_name, CASE WHEN host_since IS NULL THEN -1 ELSE host_since END AS host_since_id, host_location_country, host_location_city, host_about, host_response_time, CASE WHEN (host_response_rate LIKE 'null') THEN 1 ELSE CAST(host_response_rate AS DOUBLE) / 100.0 END AS host_response_rate, CASE WHEN (host_acceptance_rate LIKE 'null') THEN 1 ELSE CAST(host_acceptance_rate AS DOUBLE) / 100.0 END AS host_acceptance_rate, host_is_superhost LIKE 't' AS host_is_superhost, host_listings_count, host_total_listings_count, host_has_profile_pic LIKE 't' AS host_has_profile_pic, host_identity_verified LIKE 't' AS host_identity_verified, neighbourhood_cleansed, ROUND(latitude, 5) AS latitude, ROUND(longitude, 5) AS longitude, property_type, room_type, accommodates, CASE WHEN bathrooms_text LIKE 'null' THEN NULL ELSE bathrooms_text END AS bathrooms, bedrooms, beds, CASE WHEN price LIKE 'null' THEN NULL ELSE price END AS price, minimum_nights, maximum_nights, availability_30, availability_60, availability_90, availability_365, number_of_reviews, number_of_reviews_ltm, number_of_reviews_l30d, CASE WHEN estimated_revenue_l365d LIKE 'null' THEN NULL ELSE estimated_revenue_l365d END AS estimated_revenue_l365d, CASE WHEN first_review IS NULL THEN -1 ELSE first_review END AS first_review, CASE WHEN last_review IS NULL THEN -1 ELSE last_review END AS last_review, review_scores_rating, review_scores_accuracy, review_scores_cleanliness, review_scores_checkin, review_scores_communication, review_scores_location, review_scores_value, reviews_per_month FROM FLOWFILE WHERE (host_name IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 200

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute
Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern

value.name: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern

entry.key: Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

value.name: Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

entry.key: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern
Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

entry.value: SELECT id, last_scraped, name, description, neighborhood_overview, host_id, host_name, host_since, host_location_country, host_location_city, host_about, host_response_time, host_response_rate, host_acceptance_rate, host_is_superhost LIKE 't' AS host_is_superhost, host_listings_count, host_total_listings_count, host_has_profile_pic LIKE 't' AS host_has_profile_pic, host_identity_verified LIKE 't' AS host_identity_verified, neighbourhood_cleansed, ROUND(latitude, 5) AS latitude, ROUND(longitude, 5) AS longitude, property_type, room_type, accommodates, LOWER(bathrooms_text) AS bathrooms_text, bedrooms, beds, price, minimum_nights, maximum_nights, availability_30, availability_60, availability_90, availability_365, number_of_reviews, number_of_reviews_ltm, number_of_reviews_l30d, estimated_revenue_l365d, first_review, last_review, review_scores_rating, review_scores_accuracy, review_scores_cleanliness, review_scores_checkin, review_scores_communication, review_scores_location, review_scores_value, reviews_per_month FROM FLOWFILE WHERE (host_name IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 200
